Question:
Using NHANES data from the years 2005 to 2008, we will do a weigted logistic regression using exam weights.
Participants who don't have missing values for four level retinopathy grading will be included.
Participants who have diabetes will be included when diabetes was defined as meeting any of the following criteria: self-reported diabetes, use of insulin, use of diabetes medication, glycohemoglobin A1c level (%) >= 6.5%, oral glucose tolerance test (mmol/L) >= 11.1mmol/L, or serum glucose (mmol/L) >=7.0mmol/L.
Participants missing hdl-cholestrol will be excluded. The main predictor is hdl-cholestrol, categorized in tertiles(%) T1: ≤33, T2: >33 and ≤66, T3: >66. Adjust the analysis for race/Hispanic origin, age at screening, and gender.
The outcome is retinopathy presence, based on the four level retinopathy grading.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted logistic regression (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2005-2008

Inclusion Criteria:
- non-missing four level retinopathy grading
- diabetes defined as meeting any of the following criteria:
  self-reported diabetes OR
  use of insulin OR
  use of diabetes medication OR
  glycohemoglobin A1c level (%) >= 6.5% OR
  oral glucose tolerance test (mmol/L) >= 11.1mmol/L OR
  serum glucose (mmol/L) >=7.0mmol/L

Exclusion Criteria:
- missing hdl-cholestrol

Covariates:
- race/Hispanic origin
- age at screening
- gender

Predictor:
- hdl-cholestrol categorized in tertiles(%):
  T1: ≤33, T2: >33 and ≤66, T3: >66

Outcome:
- retinopathy presence based on the four level retinopathy grading

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 4.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_d
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 4.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_e
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_e;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;




-- TEMP TABLE FOR "four level retinopathy grading", "four level retinopathy grading"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye" AS "4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye"
FROM nhanes.opxret_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye" AS "4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye"
FROM nhanes.opxret_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye ON temp_master_4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "self-reported diabetes"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes ON temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "use of insulin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_taking_insulin_now;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_taking_insulin_now AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "taking_insulin_now" AS "taking_insulin_now"
FROM nhanes.diq_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "taking_insulin_now" AS "taking_insulin_now"
FROM nhanes.diq_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_taking_insulin_now ON temp_master_taking_insulin_now (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "use of diabetes medication"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar" AS "take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar"
FROM nhanes.diq_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar" AS "take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar"
FROM nhanes.diq_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar ON temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "glycohemoglobin a1c level (%)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_glycohemoglobin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_glycohemoglobin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "glycohemoglobin" AS "glycohemoglobin"
FROM nhanes.ghb_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "glycohemoglobin" AS "glycohemoglobin"
FROM nhanes.ghb_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_glycohemoglobin ON temp_master_glycohemoglobin (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "oral glucose tolerance test (mmol/l)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l" AS "two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l"
FROM nhanes.ogtt_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l" AS "two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l"
FROM nhanes.ogtt_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l ON temp_master_two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "serum glucose (mmol/l)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_glucose_serum_mmol_l;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_glucose_serum_mmol_l AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "glucose_serum_mmol_l" AS "glucose_serum_mmol_l"
FROM nhanes.biopro_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "glucose_serum_mmol_l" AS "glucose_serum_mmol_l"
FROM nhanes.biopro_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_glucose_serum_mmol_l ON temp_master_glucose_serum_mmol_l (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "hdl-cholestrol", "hdl-cholestrol", "hdl-cholestrol"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl" AS "direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl"
FROM nhanes.hdl_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl" AS "direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl"
FROM nhanes.hdl_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl ON temp_master_direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "race/hispanic origin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_race_hispanic_origin ON temp_master_race_hispanic_origin (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age at screening"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening ON temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "gender"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_gender;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_gender AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_gender ON temp_master_gender (respondent_sequence_number);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_taking_insulin_now
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_glycohemoglobin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_glucose_serum_mmol_l
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye",
    t1."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t2."taking_insulin_now",
    t3."take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar",
    t4."glycohemoglobin",
    t5."two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l",
    t6."glucose_serum_mmol_l",
    t7."direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl",
    t8."race_hispanic_origin",
    t9."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t10."gender"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_taking_insulin_now t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glucose_serum_mmol_l t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Include participants with non-missing four level retinopathy grading
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 1.2: Include participants with diabetes based on multiple criteria
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE (f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes')
   OR (f."taking_insulin_now" = 'Yes')
   OR (f."take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar" = 'Yes')
   OR (CAST(f."glycohemoglobin" AS NUMERIC) >= 6.5)
   OR (CAST(f."two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l" AS NUMERIC) >= 11.1)
   OR (CAST(f."glucose_serum_mmol_l" AS NUMERIC) >= 7.0);

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants with missing HDL-cholesterol
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final cohort after all inclusion and exclusion criteria
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1: Race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2: Age at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3: Gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4: HDL-cholesterol
-- Extract HDL-cholesterol values for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_hdl_cholesterol_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", 
       CAST(f."direct_hdl_cholesterol_mg_dl" AS NUMERIC) AS "hdl_cholesterol_value"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Calculate tertile cutoffs for HDL-cholesterol within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_hdl_cholesterol_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.33) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "hdl_cholesterol_value") AS tertile1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.66) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "hdl_cholesterol_value") AS tertile2
FROM temp_hdl_cholesterol_raw;

-- Assign HDL-cholesterol tertile groups
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_hdl_cholesterol AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "hdl_cholesterol_value" <= (SELECT tertile1 FROM temp_hdl_cholesterol_cutoffs) THEN 'T1: ≤33'
    WHEN "hdl_cholesterol_value" <= (SELECT tertile2 FROM temp_hdl_cholesterol_cutoffs) THEN 'T2: >33 and ≤66'
    ELSE 'T3: >66'
  END AS "hdl_cholestrol"
FROM temp_hdl_cholesterol_raw;

-- 4.5: Retinopathy presence
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_retinopathy_presence AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye" = 'No retinopathy' THEN 'No'
    WHEN f."4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye" IN ('Mild NPR', 'Moderate/severe NPR', 'PR (Proliferative)') THEN 'Yes'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT 
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  a."age_at_screening",
  g."gender",
  h."hdl_cholestrol",
  rp."retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_age_at_screening a ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = a."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_hdl_cholesterol h ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = h."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_retinopathy_presence rp ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = rp."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: View Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."age_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."hdl_cholestrol",
    ft."retinopathy_presence"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";
  
-- Preview the result
SELECT * FROM temp_final_with_weights;

R:
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(broom))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))

    identifier_vars <- c("respondent_sequence_number")
    outcome_vars <- c("retinopathy_presence")
    weight_vars <- c("survey_weight","masked_variance_pseudo_psu","masked_variance_pseudo_stratum","in_analysis")

    cohort <- df[df$in_analysis == 1, names(df) != "in_analysis"]


    outcome_roles <- c()
    outcome_roles["retinopathy_presence"] <- "outcome"


    summarize_variable <- function(column, name) {
    n_unique <- length(unique(na.omit(column)))
    na_count <- sum(is.na(column))

    if (name %in% identifier_vars) {
        category <- "identifier"
        summary_info <- paste0("Total rows = ", nrow(cohort))

    } else if (name %in% outcome_vars) {
        # Assign its special role (e.g., "outcome", "mediator")
        category <- ifelse(!is.na(outcome_roles[name]), outcome_roles[name], "outcome")

        # Generate a summary based on its underlying data type
        underlying_type <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (underlying_type == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (underlying_type %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }

    

    } else if (name %in% weight_vars) {
        category <- "weight"
        summary_info <- "Weight variable" 
    

    } else {
        # This block handles regular predictors
        category <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (category == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (category %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }
    }

    data.frame(
        variable   = name,
        category   = category,
        n_unique   = n_unique,
        na_count   = na_count,
        summary    = summary_info,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    }

    report <- bind_rows(
    lapply(names(cohort), function(col_name) {
        summarize_variable(cohort[[col_name]], col_name)
    })
    )

    identifier_vars  <- report$variable[report$category == "identifier"]
    cat("Identifier Variables:\n");   print(identifier_vars);   cat("\n")

    weight_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "weight"]; cat("Weight Variables: "); print(weight_vars); psu_var <- weight_vars[grepl("psu", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("PSU:", psu_var); stratum_var <- weight_vars[grepl("stratum", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Stratum:", stratum_var); weight_var <- weight_vars[grepl("weight", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Weight:", weight_var); in_analysis_var <- weight_vars[grepl("in_analysis", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("In Analysis:", in_analysis_var)

    binary_vars      <- report$variable[report$category == "binary"]
    cat("Binary Variables:\n");       print(binary_vars);       cat("\n")
    print(binary_vars)

    categorical_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "categorical"]
    cat("Categorical Variables:\n");  print(categorical_vars);  cat("\n")
    print(categorical_vars)

    numerical_vars   <- report$variable[report$category == "numerical"]
    cat("Numerical Variables:\n");    print(numerical_vars);    cat("\n")
    print(numerical_vars)

    
    

    outcome_var     <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("outcome")]
    cat("Outcome Variables:\n");      print(outcome_var);      cat("\n")
    

    
    library(survey)
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
        
    
    
    # Identify predictors and factor candidates
    predictor_vars <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary", "numerical")]
    factor_candidates <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary")]

    # Convert binary/categorical variables to factor if not already
    for (var in factor_candidates) {
    if (!is.factor(df[[var]])) {
        df[[var]] <- as.factor(df[[var]])
    }
    }

    # Initialize reference_levels table
    reference_levels <- tibble(variable = character(), reference_level = character())

    # Clean, trim, and set reference levels for all factor variables
    for (col in factor_candidates) {
    df[[col]] <- factor(trimws(as.character(df[[col]])))
    levels_vec <- levels(df[[col]])

    # Try to find preferred reference
    preferred_order <- c("healthy", "none", "control", "reference", "ref", "normal","Q1", "low", "0", "1")
    matches <- tolower(levels_vec)  # lower case to standardize
    ref_level <- NA  # default

    for (keyword in preferred_order) {
    idx <- which(grepl(keyword, matches, ignore.case = TRUE))
    if (length(idx) > 0) {
        ref_level <- levels_vec[idx[1]]  # pick the first match for that keyword
        break  # stop at the highest-priority match
    }
    }


    # If none found, fall back to most common level
    if (is.na(ref_level)) {
        level_counts <- table(df[[col]])
        ref_level <- names(level_counts)[which.max(level_counts)]
    }

    # Set reference level
    df[[col]] <- relevel(df[[col]], ref = ref_level)

    # Record reference level
    reference_levels <- bind_rows(
        reference_levels,
        tibble(variable = col, reference_level = ref_level)
    )
    }
    
        
    
    x_raw <- df[[outcome_var]]
    x_chr <- trimws(tolower(as.character(x_raw)))

    none_tokens <- c("none", "nan", "na", "", "null", "nil", "missing")
    x_chr[x_chr %in% none_tokens] <- NA_character_
    y <- rep(NA_integer_, length(x_chr))
    y[x_chr %in% c("yes", "y", "true", "t")]  <- 1L
    y[x_chr %in% c("no",  "n", "false", "f")] <- 0L
    x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 1] <- 1L
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 0] <- 0L
    idx <- is.na(y) & !is.na(x_chr)
    if (any(idx)) {
    vals <- sort(unique(x_chr[idx]))
    if (length(vals) != 2) {
        stop(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' must have exactly 2 non-missing classes after excluding none. Found: %s",
        outcome_var, paste(vals, collapse = ", ")
        ))
    }
    tab <- table(x_chr[idx])
    minority <- names(tab)[which.min(tab)]
    majority <- setdiff(vals, minority)
    cat(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' recoding: 1 = %s (minority)  0 = %s (majority)",
        outcome_var, minority, majority
    ))
    y[idx] <- as.integer(x_chr[idx] == minority)
    }
    df[[outcome_var]] <- y
    u <- sort(unique(df[[outcome_var]][!is.na(df[[outcome_var]])]))
    if (!(length(u) == 2 && all(u == c(0, 1)))) {
    stop(sprintf(
        "After recoding, '%s' must contain both 0 and 1 (plus NA for none). Found: %s",
        outcome_var,
        ifelse(length(u) == 0, "<no non-missing values>", paste(u, collapse = ", "))
    ))
    }
    formula <- as.formula(paste0(outcome_var, " ~ ", paste(predictor_vars, collapse = " + ")))
            
    
    survey_design <- svydesign(
        ids     = as.formula(paste0("~", psu_var)),
        strata  = as.formula(paste0("~", stratum_var)),
        weights = as.formula(paste0("~", weight_var)),
        data    = df,
        nest    = TRUE
        )
    survey_design <- subset(survey_design, in_analysis ==1)
        
    
    model <- svyglm(formula,design = survey_design, family = quasibinomial()) 
            
    
    result_table <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
            select(term, estimate, p.value, conf.low, conf.high)
